question: qué OCs se crearon entre el 1 y el 31 de mayo de 2026, con líneas, kilos y valor USD
sql:
SELECT po.order_consecutive, c.client_name, c.nit, po.order_creation_date, po.status,
       po.is_new_win, po.is_muestra,
       COUNT(DISTINCT pop.id) AS lineas,
       SUM(pop.quantity) AS kilos_totales,
       SUM(pop.quantity * pop.price) AS valor_usd
FROM purchase_orders po
JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id
LEFT JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.purchase_order_id = po.id AND pop.muestra = 0
WHERE po.order_creation_date BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2026-05-31'
  AND po.status != 'cancelled'
GROUP BY po.id, po.order_consecutive, c.client_name, c.nit, po.order_creation_date, po.status, po.is_new_win, po.is_muestra
ORDER BY po.order_creation_date DESC;

question: qué órdenes están pendientes y cuántos días llevan desde su creación
sql:
SELECT po.order_consecutive, c.client_name, po.order_creation_date,
       DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), po.order_creation_date) AS dias_pendiente,
       SUM(pop.quantity) AS kilos_solicitados
FROM purchase_orders po
JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id
LEFT JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.purchase_order_id = po.id AND pop.muestra = 0
WHERE po.status = 'pending'
GROUP BY po.id, po.order_consecutive, c.client_name, po.order_creation_date
ORDER BY dias_pendiente DESC;

question: qué OCs están rezagadas: en processing hace más de 7 días sin ningún despacho real
sql:
SELECT po.order_consecutive, c.client_name, po.order_creation_date,
       DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), po.order_creation_date) AS dias_sin_despacho,
       SUM(pop.quantity) AS kilos_solicitados
FROM purchase_orders po
JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id
JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.purchase_order_id = po.id AND pop.muestra = 0
WHERE po.status = 'processing'
  AND DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), po.order_creation_date) > 7
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM partials par
    WHERE par.order_id = po.id AND par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL
  )
GROUP BY po.id, po.order_consecutive, c.client_name, po.order_creation_date
ORDER BY dias_sin_despacho DESC;

question: qué OCs activas tienen kilos pendientes por despachar (pedido menos despachado)
sql:
WITH despachado AS (
  SELECT par.product_order_id, SUM(par.quantity) AS kilos_reales
  FROM partials par
  WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL
  GROUP BY par.product_order_id
)
SELECT po.order_consecutive, c.client_name, po.status, p.code, p.product_name,
       pop.quantity AS kilos_pedidos,
       COALESCE(d.kilos_reales, 0) AS kilos_despachados,
       pop.quantity - COALESCE(d.kilos_reales, 0) AS kilos_pendientes
FROM purchase_orders po
JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id
JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.purchase_order_id = po.id AND pop.muestra = 0
JOIN products p ON p.id = pop.product_id
LEFT JOIN despachado d ON d.product_order_id = pop.id
WHERE po.status IN ('processing', 'parcial_status', 'completed')
  AND pop.quantity > COALESCE(d.kilos_reales, 0)
ORDER BY kilos_pendientes DESC;

question: cuáles fueron los despachos de mayo de 2026 con factura, guía y TRM
sql:
# ⚠ TRM: normalizar SIEMPRE, incluso al solo mostrarla. Hay filas con trm guardada x100
# (365516 = 3655.16); mostrarla cruda le pone al usuario una TRM absurda en pantalla.
SELECT par.dispatch_date, po.order_consecutive, c.client_name,
       p.code, p.product_name, par.quantity AS kilos,
       par.invoice_number, par.tracking_number, par.transporter,
       CASE WHEN (par.trm + 0) > 10000 THEN ROUND((par.trm + 0) / 100, 2) ELSE (par.trm + 0) END AS trm
FROM partials par
JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0
JOIN products p ON p.id = pop.product_id
JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled'
JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id
WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2026-05-31'
ORDER BY par.dispatch_date DESC;

question: cuál es el promedio de días entre la creación de la OC y el primer despacho real en 2026
sql:
WITH primer_real AS (
  SELECT par.order_id, MIN(par.dispatch_date) AS first_dispatch
  FROM partials par
  WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL
  GROUP BY par.order_id
)
SELECT AVG(GREATEST(DATEDIFF(pr.first_dispatch, po.order_creation_date), 0)) AS dias_promedio,
       MIN(GREATEST(DATEDIFF(pr.first_dispatch, po.order_creation_date), 0)) AS dias_min,
       MAX(GREATEST(DATEDIFF(pr.first_dispatch, po.order_creation_date), 0)) AS dias_max,
       COUNT(*) AS ocs_consideradas
FROM purchase_orders po
JOIN primer_real pr ON pr.order_id = po.id
WHERE YEAR(pr.first_dispatch) = 2026
  AND po.status != 'cancelled';

question: qué productos se despacharon en mayo de 2026 con su valor en USD y COP usando la cascada de TRM
sql:
SELECT par.dispatch_date, c.client_name, p.code, p.product_name,
       par.quantity AS kilos, pop.price AS precio_usd,
       (par.quantity * pop.price) AS valor_usd,
       COALESCE(
         NULLIF(CASE WHEN (par.trm + 0) BETWEEN 3200 AND 10000 THEN (par.trm + 0)
                     WHEN (par.trm + 0) > 10000 THEN (par.trm + 0) / 100
                     ELSE NULL END, 0),
         (SELECT td.value FROM trm_daily td WHERE td.date <= par.dispatch_date AND td.value >= 3200 ORDER BY td.date DESC LIMIT 1),
         4000
       ) AS trm_eff,
       par.quantity * pop.price * COALESCE(
         NULLIF(CASE WHEN (par.trm + 0) BETWEEN 3200 AND 10000 THEN (par.trm + 0)
                     WHEN (par.trm + 0) > 10000 THEN (par.trm + 0) / 100
                     ELSE NULL END, 0),
         (SELECT td.value FROM trm_daily td WHERE td.date <= par.dispatch_date AND td.value >= 3200 ORDER BY td.date DESC LIMIT 1),
         4000
       ) AS valor_cop
FROM partials par
JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0
JOIN products p ON p.id = pop.product_id
JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled'
JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id
WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2026-05-31'
ORDER BY valor_usd DESC;

question: cuál es el total facturado mes a mes del año 2026 en kilos, USD y COP
sql:
SELECT MONTH(par.dispatch_date) AS mes_num,
       DATE_FORMAT(par.dispatch_date, '%Y-%m') AS mes,
       SUM(par.quantity) AS kilos,
       SUM(par.quantity * pop.price) AS valor_usd,
       SUM(par.quantity * pop.price * COALESCE(
         NULLIF(CASE WHEN (par.trm + 0) BETWEEN 3200 AND 10000 THEN (par.trm + 0)
                     WHEN (par.trm + 0) > 10000 THEN (par.trm + 0) / 100
                     ELSE NULL END, 0),
         (SELECT td.value FROM trm_daily td WHERE td.date <= par.dispatch_date AND td.value >= 3200 ORDER BY td.date DESC LIMIT 1),
         4000
       )) AS valor_cop
FROM partials par
JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0
JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled'
WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND YEAR(par.dispatch_date) = 2026
GROUP BY MONTH(par.dispatch_date), DATE_FORMAT(par.dispatch_date, '%Y-%m')

question: cómo se compara el pronóstico vs lo real por producto en mayo de 2026
sql:
WITH product_ranked AS (
  SELECT id, client_id, code, product_name,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY client_id, code ORDER BY id) AS rn
  FROM products
),
reales AS (
  SELECT c.nit, p.code AS codigo, SUM(par.quantity) AS kilos_reales
  FROM partials par
  JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0
  JOIN products p ON p.id = pop.product_id
  JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled'
  JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id
  WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL
    AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2026-05-31'
  GROUP BY c.nit, p.code
)
SELECT c.client_name AS cliente, sf.codigo, p.product_name AS referencia,
       SUM(sf.cantidad_forecast) AS kilos_pronosticados,
       COALESCE(r.kilos_reales, 0) AS kilos_reales,
       SUM(sf.cantidad_forecast) - COALESCE(r.kilos_reales, 0) AS kilos_faltantes,
       ROUND(COALESCE(r.kilos_reales, 0) / NULLIF(SUM(sf.cantidad_forecast), 0) * 100, 2) AS cumplimiento_pct
FROM sales_forecasts sf
JOIN clients c ON c.nit = sf.nit
JOIN product_ranked p ON p.client_id = c.id AND p.code = sf.codigo AND p.rn = 1
LEFT JOIN reales r ON r.nit = sf.nit AND r.codigo = sf.codigo
WHERE sf.modelo = 'manual' AND sf.año = '2026' AND sf.mes = 'MAYO'
GROUP BY c.client_name, sf.codigo, p.product_name, r.kilos_reales
ORDER BY kilos_faltantes DESC;

question: cuál es el cumplimiento de pronóstico por ejecutiva en mayo de 2026
sql:
WITH pron_cli AS (
  SELECT c.id AS client_id, c.executive AS exec_email,
         SUM(sf.cantidad_forecast) AS pron
  FROM sales_forecasts sf
  JOIN clients c ON c.nit = sf.nit
  WHERE sf.modelo = 'manual' AND sf.año = '2026' AND sf.mes = 'MAYO'
  GROUP BY c.id, c.executive
),
real_cli AS (
  SELECT c.id AS client_id, SUM(par.quantity) AS real_k
  FROM partials par
  JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0
  JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled'
  JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id
  WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL
    AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2026-05-31'
  GROUP BY c.id
)
SELECT e.name AS ejecutiva,
       SUM(p.pron) AS kilos_pronosticados,
       SUM(COALESCE(r.real_k, 0)) AS kilos_reales,
       ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(r.real_k, 0)) / NULLIF(SUM(p.pron), 0) * 100, 2) AS cumplimiento_pct
FROM pron_cli p
JOIN executives e ON e.email = p.exec_email AND e.is_active = 1
LEFT JOIN real_cli r ON r.client_id = p.client_id
GROUP BY e.id, e.name
ORDER BY cumplimiento_pct DESC;

question: qué productos le faltan por vender a Claudia Cueter en mayo de 2026 según el pronóstico
sql:
WITH product_ranked AS (

         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY client_id, code ORDER BY id) AS rn
  FROM products
),
reales AS (

  FROM partials par
  JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0

question: cómo se compara el pronóstico del modelo manual vs el modelo xgboost por cliente en mayo de 2026
sql:
WITH manual AS (
  SELECT nit, SUM(cantidad_forecast) AS kilos_manual
  FROM sales_forecasts
  WHERE modelo = 'manual' AND año = '2026' AND mes = 'MAYO'
  GROUP BY nit
),
estadistico AS (
  SELECT nit, SUM(cantidad_forecast) AS kilos_xgb
  FROM sales_forecasts
  WHERE modelo = 'xgboost' AND año = '2026' AND mes = 'MAYO'
  GROUP BY nit
)
SELECT c.client_name AS cliente, c.nit,
       COALESCE(m.kilos_manual, 0) AS pronostico_manual,
       COALESCE(e.kilos_xgb, 0) AS pronostico_xgboost,
       COALESCE(m.kilos_manual, 0) - COALESCE(e.kilos_xgb, 0) AS diferencia
FROM clients c
LEFT JOIN manual m ON m.nit = c.nit
LEFT JOIN estadistico e ON e.nit = c.nit
WHERE COALESCE(m.kilos_manual, 0) + COALESCE(e.kilos_xgb, 0) > 0
ORDER BY ABS(COALESCE(m.kilos_manual, 0) - COALESCE(e.kilos_xgb, 0)) DESC;

question: cuál es el cumplimiento acumulado del año 2026 por ejecutiva
sql:
# ⚠ 'acumulado' = meses TRANSCURRIDOS: alinear AMBOS lados al mismo rango (definición del código, SendForecastEmails.php).
# Distinto de 'al cierre/anual', donde el pronóstico SÍ va del año completo.
# ⚠ Mismo patrón anti-duplicación que #15 — agregar por cliente primero.
WITH pron_cli_year AS (
  SELECT c.id AS client_id, c.executive AS exec_email,
         SUM(sf.cantidad_forecast) AS pron
  FROM sales_forecasts sf
  JOIN clients c ON c.nit = sf.nit
  WHERE sf.modelo = 'manual' AND sf.año = '2026'
     AND sf.mes IN ('ENERO','FEBRERO','MARZO','ABRIL','MAYO','JUNIO','JULIO')
  GROUP BY c.id, c.executive
),
real_cli_year AS (
  SELECT c.id AS client_id, SUM(par.quantity) AS real_k
  FROM partials par
  JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0
  JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled'
  JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id
  WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL
    AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND '2026-07-31'
  GROUP BY c.id
)
SELECT e.name AS ejecutiva,
       SUM(p.pron) AS pronostico_acumulado,
       SUM(COALESCE(r.real_k, 0)) AS real_acumulado,
       SUM(p.pron) - SUM(COALESCE(r.real_k, 0)) AS faltan,
       ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(r.real_k, 0)) / NULLIF(SUM(p.pron), 0) * 100, 2) AS cumplimiento_pct
FROM pron_cli_year p
JOIN executives e ON e.email = p.exec_email AND e.is_active = 1
LEFT JOIN real_cli_year r ON r.client_id = p.client_id
GROUP BY e.id, e.name
ORDER BY cumplimiento_pct DESC;

question: cómo se comparan los pagos recibidos vs lo facturado por cliente en 2026
sql:
# Nota: recaudos.nit es BIGINT — usar CAST(... AS CHAR) para cruzar con clients.nit VARCHAR.
WITH facturado AS (
  SELECT c.nit, SUM(par.quantity * pop.price * COALESCE(
    NULLIF(CASE WHEN (par.trm + 0) BETWEEN 3200 AND 10000 THEN (par.trm + 0)
                WHEN (par.trm + 0) > 10000 THEN (par.trm + 0) / 100
                ELSE NULL END, 0),
    (SELECT td.value FROM trm_daily td WHERE td.date <= par.dispatch_date AND td.value >= 3200 ORDER BY td.date DESC LIMIT 1),
    4000
  )) AS facturado_cop
  FROM partials par
  JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0
  JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled'
  JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id
  WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL
    AND YEAR(par.dispatch_date) = 2026
  GROUP BY c.nit
),
recaudado AS (
  SELECT CAST(r.nit AS CHAR) AS nit_char, SUM(r.valor_cancelado) AS recaudado_cop
  FROM recaudos r
  WHERE YEAR(r.fecha_recaudo) = 2026
  GROUP BY CAST(r.nit AS CHAR)
)
SELECT c.client_name AS cliente, c.nit,
       COALESCE(f.facturado_cop, 0) AS facturado_cop,
       COALESCE(re.recaudado_cop, 0) AS recaudado_cop,
       COALESCE(f.facturado_cop, 0) - COALESCE(re.recaudado_cop, 0) AS pendiente_cop
FROM clients c
LEFT JOIN facturado f ON f.nit = c.nit
LEFT JOIN recaudado re ON re.nit_char = c.nit
WHERE COALESCE(f.facturado_cop, 0) + COALESCE(re.recaudado_cop, 0) > 0
ORDER BY pendiente_cop DESC;

question: qué OCs pendientes tiene un cliente de laboratorio, con kilos pedidos, ya despachados y fecha estimada

  WHERE type = 'temporal' AND deleted_at IS NULL
  GROUP BY product_order_id
),
despachado AS (

       pop.quantity AS kilos_pedidos,

question: cómo se compara el primer cuatrimestre de 2026 vs el de 2025 por cliente, en pesos (COP)
sql:
WITH ventas_periodo AS (
  SELECT c.id AS client_id, c.client_name,
         YEAR(par.dispatch_date) AS anio,
         SUM(par.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0) * COALESCE(
           NULLIF(CASE WHEN (par.trm + 0) BETWEEN 3200 AND 10000 THEN (par.trm + 0)
                       WHEN (par.trm + 0) > 10000 THEN (par.trm + 0) / 100
                       ELSE NULL END, 0),
           (SELECT td.value FROM trm_daily td WHERE td.date <= par.dispatch_date AND td.value >= 3200 ORDER BY td.date DESC LIMIT 1),
           4000
         )) AS valor_cop
  FROM partials par
  JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0
  JOIN products p ON p.id = pop.product_id
  JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled'
  JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id
  WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL
    AND (
      (par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND '2026-04-30') OR
      (par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2025-01-01' AND '2025-04-30')
    )
  GROUP BY c.id, c.client_name, YEAR(par.dispatch_date)
)
SELECT client_name,
       SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2025 THEN valor_cop ELSE 0 END) AS venta_2025_cop,
       SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2026 THEN valor_cop ELSE 0 END) AS venta_2026_cop,
       SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2026 THEN valor_cop ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2025 THEN valor_cop ELSE 0 END) AS diferencia_cop
FROM ventas_periodo
GROUP BY client_id, client_name
ORDER BY ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2026 THEN valor_cop ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2025 THEN valor_cop ELSE 0 END)) DESC;

WITH presupuesto AS (
  SELECT c.executive AS exec_email,
         SUM(sf.cantidad_forecast * COALESCE(NULLIF(p.price, 0), 0)) AS presupuesto_usd
  FROM sales_forecasts sf
  JOIN clients c ON c.nit = sf.nit
  JOIN (
    SELECT id, client_id, code, price,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY client_id, code ORDER BY id) AS rn
    FROM products
  ) p ON p.client_id = c.id AND p.code = sf.codigo AND p.rn = 1
  WHERE sf.modelo = 'manual' AND sf.año = '2026'
  GROUP BY c.executive
),
venta_actual AS (
  SELECT c.executive AS exec_email,
         SUM(par.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0)) AS venta_usd
  FROM partials par
  JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0
  JOIN products p ON p.id = pop.product_id
  JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled'
  JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id
  WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND YEAR(par.dispatch_date) = 2026
  GROUP BY c.executive
),
venta_anterior AS (
  SELECT c.executive AS exec_email,
         SUM(par.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0)) AS venta_usd
  FROM partials par
  JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0
  JOIN products p ON p.id = pop.product_id
  JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled'
  JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id
  WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND YEAR(par.dispatch_date) = 2025
  GROUP BY c.executive
)
SELECT e.name AS ejecutiva,
       COALESCE(pr.presupuesto_usd, 0) AS presupuesto_2026_usd,
       COALESCE(va.venta_usd, 0) AS venta_2026_usd,
       COALESCE(vp.venta_usd, 0) AS venta_2025_usd,
       COALESCE(va.venta_usd, 0) - COALESCE(vp.venta_usd, 0) AS crecimiento_usd,
       ROUND((COALESCE(va.venta_usd, 0) - COALESCE(vp.venta_usd, 0)) / NULLIF(COALESCE(vp.venta_usd, 0), 0) * 100, 2) AS crecimiento_pct
FROM executives e
LEFT JOIN presupuesto pr ON pr.exec_email = e.email
LEFT JOIN venta_actual va ON va.exec_email = e.email
LEFT JOIN venta_anterior vp ON vp.exec_email = e.email
WHERE e.is_active = 1
ORDER BY presupuesto_2026_usd DESC;

question: cuál es el cumplimiento de pronóstico por cliente en mayo de 2026, sin agrupar por ejecutiva

WITH pron_cli AS (
  SELECT c.id AS client_id, c.client_name,
         SUM(sf.cantidad_forecast) AS pron
  FROM sales_forecasts sf
  JOIN clients c ON c.nit = sf.nit
  WHERE sf.modelo = 'manual' AND sf.año = '2026' AND sf.mes = 'MAYO'
  GROUP BY c.id, c.client_name
),
real_cli AS (
  SELECT c.id AS client_id, SUM(par.quantity) AS real_k
  FROM partials par
  JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0
  JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled'
  JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id
  WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL
    AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2026-05-31'
  GROUP BY c.id
)
SELECT p.client_name AS cliente,
       p.pron AS kilos_pronosticados,
       COALESCE(r.real_k, 0) AS kilos_reales,
       p.pron - COALESCE(r.real_k, 0) AS kilos_faltantes,
       ROUND(COALESCE(r.real_k, 0) / NULLIF(p.pron, 0) * 100, 2) AS cumplimiento_pct
FROM pron_cli p
LEFT JOIN real_cli r ON r.client_id = p.client_id
ORDER BY cumplimiento_pct ASC;

sql:
# ⚠ TRM: SIEMPRE normalizar. Hay despachos con trm guardada x100 (365516 = 3655.16).
# Usar par.trm crudo infla el COP hasta 24x en esos clientes (+61% en el total 2026).
WITH
despachos AS (
  SELECT
    e.id AS executive_id,
    e.name AS ejecutiva,
    SUM(par.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0)) AS valor_usd,
    SUM(par.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0) *
        COALESCE(NULLIF(CASE WHEN (par.trm + 0) BETWEEN 3200 AND 10000 THEN (par.trm + 0) WHEN (par.trm + 0) > 10000 THEN (par.trm + 0) / 100 ELSE NULL END, 0), (SELECT td.value FROM trm_daily td WHERE td.date <= par.dispatch_date AND td.value >= 3200 ORDER BY td.date DESC LIMIT 1), 4000)
    ) AS valor_cop,
    SUM(par.quantity) AS dispatched_kilos,
    SUM(CASE WHEN par.dispatch_date <= pop.delivery_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS on_time_lines,
    COUNT(par.id) AS total_lines
  FROM partials par
  JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON par.product_order_id = pop.id AND pop.muestra=0
  JOIN purchase_orders po ON pop.purchase_order_id = po.id AND po.status != 'cancelled'
  JOIN clients c ON po.client_id = c.id
  JOIN executives e ON e.email = c.executive COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AND e.is_active = 1
  JOIN products p ON pop.product_id = p.id
  WHERE par.type='real'
    AND par.deleted_at IS NULL
    AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-03-01' AND '2026-03-31'
  GROUP BY e.id, e.name
),
pedidos AS (
  -- CTE independiente arrancando desde purchase_order_product (NUNCA SUM(pop.quantity) en el
  -- mismo CTE que itera sobre partials, ver regla anti-inflación de buildRulesBlock()).
  SELECT
    e.id AS executive_id,
    SUM(pop.quantity) AS total_kilos
  FROM purchase_order_product pop
  JOIN purchase_orders po ON pop.purchase_order_id = po.id AND po.status != 'cancelled'
  JOIN clients c ON po.client_id = c.id
  JOIN executives e ON e.email = c.executive COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AND e.is_active = 1
  WHERE pop.muestra = 0
    AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM partials par2
      WHERE par2.product_order_id = pop.id AND par2.type='real' AND par2.deleted_at IS NULL
        AND par2.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-03-01' AND '2026-03-31'
    )
  GROUP BY e.id
),
new_wins AS (
  SELECT
    e.id AS executive_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT po.order_consecutive) AS new_wins
  FROM purchase_orders po
  JOIN clients c ON po.client_id = c.id
  JOIN executives e ON e.email = c.executive COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AND e.is_active = 1
  WHERE po.is_new_win=1
    AND po.order_creation_date BETWEEN '2026-03-01' AND '2026-03-31'
  GROUP BY e.id
),
estancadas AS (
  SELECT
    e.id AS executive_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT po.order_consecutive) AS ocs_estancadas
  FROM purchase_orders po
  JOIN clients c ON po.client_id = c.id
  JOIN executives e ON e.email = c.executive COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AND e.is_active = 1
  WHERE po.status IN ('pending','processing','parcial_status')
    AND DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), po.order_creation_date) > 7
  GROUP BY e.id
)
SELECT
  d.ejecutiva,
  d.valor_usd,
  d.valor_cop,
  ROUND(d.dispatched_kilos/NULLIF(pe.total_kilos,0)*100,1) AS fill_rate,
  ROUND(d.on_time_lines/NULLIF(d.total_lines,0)*100,1) AS pct_entrega_a_tiempo,
  COALESCE(nw.new_wins,0) AS new_wins,
  COALESCE(es.ocs_estancadas,0) AS ocs_estancadas,
  (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CAST(ca.saldo_contable AS DECIMAL(20,2))), 0)
    FROM cartera ca JOIN clients cc ON cc.nit = ca.nit
    WHERE ca.fecha_cartera = (SELECT fecha_cartera FROM cartera GROUP BY fecha_cartera HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT nit) >= 0.5 * (SELECT MAX(cnt) FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT nit) cnt FROM cartera GROUP BY fecha_cartera) z) ORDER BY fecha_cartera DESC LIMIT 1)
      AND ca.dias < 0
      AND cc.executive COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = ee.email
  ) AS cartera_vencida
FROM despachos d
JOIN executives ee ON ee.id = d.executive_id
LEFT JOIN pedidos pe ON pe.executive_id = d.executive_id
LEFT JOIN new_wins nw ON d.executive_id = nw.executive_id
LEFT JOIN estancadas es ON d.executive_id = es.executive_id
ORDER BY d.valor_usd DESC

question: muestrame los clientes con mas ventas
sql:
# ⚠ TRM + GROUP BY: dos reglas a la vez.
#  1) Normalizar SIEMPRE: hay despachos con trm guardada x100 (365516 = 3655.16). Usarla
#     cruda infla el COP hasta 24x en esos clientes (+61% en el total 2026).
#  2) La cascada referencia par.dispatch_date, así que NO puede ir dentro de un SUM con
#     GROUP BY (error 1055): se calcula POR FILA en una subconsulta derivada y se agrega AFUERA.
SELECT cliente, nit,
       ROUND(SUM(kilos), 1) AS kilos,
       ROUND(SUM(valor_usd), 2) AS valor_usd,
       ROUND(SUM(valor_cop), 0) AS valor_cop
FROM (
  SELECT c.client_name AS cliente, c.nit AS nit,
         par.quantity AS kilos,
         par.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0) AS valor_usd,
         par.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0) * COALESCE(
           NULLIF(CASE WHEN (par.trm + 0) BETWEEN 3200 AND 10000 THEN (par.trm + 0)
                       WHEN (par.trm + 0) > 10000 THEN (par.trm + 0) / 100
                       ELSE NULL END, 0),
           (SELECT td.value FROM trm_daily td WHERE td.date <= par.dispatch_date AND td.value >= 3200
             ORDER BY td.date DESC LIMIT 1),
           4000
         ) AS valor_cop
  FROM partials par
  JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0
  JOIN products p ON p.id = pop.product_id
  JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status <> 'cancelled'
  JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id
  WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL
    AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-03-01' AND '2026-03-31'
) t
GROUP BY cliente, nit
ORDER BY valor_cop DESC

question: ¿Cuántos clientes inactivos (sin despachos reales en los últimos 6 meses) tiene cada ejecutiva?
sql:
WITH clientes_activos AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT c.id AS client_id
  FROM partials par
  JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0
  JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled'
  JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id
  WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL
    AND par.dispatch_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)
)
SELECT e.name AS ejecutiva, COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS clientes_inactivos
FROM clients c
JOIN executives e ON e.email = c.executive COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AND e.is_active = 1
LEFT JOIN clientes_activos ca ON ca.client_id = c.id
WHERE ca.client_id IS NULL AND c.status = 'active'
GROUP BY e.id, e.name
ORDER BY clientes_inactivos DESC;

question: ¿Cuál es el tiempo promedio en días entre la creación de la OC y el primer despacho real, por tipo de cliente (AA, A, B, C)?
sql:
WITH primer_despacho AS (
  SELECT po.id AS order_id, MIN(par.dispatch_date) AS primer_despacho
  FROM partials par
  JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0
  JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled'
  WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL
  GROUP BY po.id
)
SELECT c.client_type, ROUND(AVG(DATEDIFF(pd.primer_despacho, po.order_creation_date)), 1) AS dias_promedio
FROM purchase_orders po
JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id AND c.client_type IN ('AA','A','B','C')
JOIN primer_despacho pd ON pd.order_id = po.id
WHERE po.status != 'cancelled'
GROUP BY c.client_type
ORDER BY FIELD(c.client_type, 'AA', 'A', 'B', 'C');

question: ¿Cuáles son los 10 productos con mayor valor despachado en USD en 2026? (nota: no se puede calcular 'rentabilidad' porque el esquema no tiene costo de producto; se reporta el ranking por valor despachado)
sql:
WITH despachos AS (
  SELECT p.code, MAX(p.product_name) AS product_name, SUM(par.quantity) AS kilos, SUM(par.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0)) AS valor_usd
  FROM partials par
  JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0
  JOIN products p ON p.id = pop.product_id
  JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled'
  WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND YEAR(par.dispatch_date) = 2026
  GROUP BY p.code
)
SELECT code, product_name, kilos, valor_usd
FROM despachos
ORDER BY valor_usd DESC
LIMIT 10;

question: ¿Cuál es el porcentaje de cumplimiento del pronóstico manual por ejecutiva en el primer trimestre de 2026 (enero a marzo)?
sql:
WITH pron_por_ejecutiva AS (
  SELECT c.executive, SUM(sf.cantidad_forecast) AS kilos_pronosticados
  FROM sales_forecasts sf
  JOIN clients c ON c.nit = sf.nit
  WHERE sf.modelo = 'manual' AND sf.año = '2026' AND sf.mes IN ('ENERO','FEBRERO','MARZO')
  GROUP BY c.executive
),
real_por_ejecutiva AS (
  SELECT c.executive, SUM(par.quantity) AS kilos_reales
  FROM partials par
  JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0
  JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled'
  JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id
  WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL
    AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND '2026-03-31'
  GROUP BY c.executive
)
SELECT e.name AS ejecutiva, COALESCE(p.kilos_pronosticados, 0) AS kilos_pronosticados, COALESCE(r.kilos_reales, 0) AS kilos_reales, ROUND(COALESCE(r.kilos_reales, 0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(p.kilos_pronosticados, 0), 0) * 100, 2) AS cumplimiento_pct
FROM executives e
LEFT JOIN pron_por_ejecutiva p ON p.executive COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = e.email
LEFT JOIN real_por_ejecutiva r ON r.executive COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = e.email
WHERE e.is_active = 1
ORDER BY cumplimiento_pct ASC;

question: ¿Cuántos kilos se despacharon en 2026 por mes, comparando con el mismo mes del año anterior (2025)?
sql:
WITH despachos_2026 AS (
  SELECT MONTH(par.dispatch_date) AS mes, SUM(par.quantity) AS kilos_2026
  FROM partials par
  JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0
  JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled'
  WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND YEAR(par.dispatch_date) = 2026
  GROUP BY MONTH(par.dispatch_date)
),
despachos_2025 AS (
  SELECT MONTH(par.dispatch_date) AS mes, SUM(par.quantity) AS kilos_2025
  FROM partials par
  JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0
  JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled'
  WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND YEAR(par.dispatch_date) = 2025
  GROUP BY MONTH(par.dispatch_date)
),
todos_meses AS (
  SELECT mes FROM despachos_2026 UNION SELECT mes FROM despachos_2025
)
SELECT tm.mes, COALESCE(d26.kilos_2026, 0) AS kilos_2026, COALESCE(d25.kilos_2025, 0) AS kilos_2025, ROUND((COALESCE(d26.kilos_2026, 0) - COALESCE(d25.kilos_2025, 0)) / NULLIF(COALESCE(d25.kilos_2025, 0), 0) * 100, 2) AS crecimiento_pct
FROM todos_meses tm
LEFT JOIN despachos_2026 d26 ON d26.mes = tm.mes
LEFT JOIN despachos_2025 d25 ON d25.mes = tm.mes
ORDER BY tm.mes;

question: ¿Cuál es el fill rate (kilos despachados / kilos pedidos) por cliente en 2026, para los clientes con más de 1000 kilos pedidos?
sql:
WITH pedidos AS (
  SELECT po.client_id, SUM(pop.quantity) AS kilos_pedidos
  FROM purchase_orders po
  JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.purchase_order_id = po.id AND pop.muestra = 0
  WHERE po.status != 'cancelled'
    AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM partials par
      WHERE par.order_id = po.id AND par.type='real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL
        AND YEAR(par.dispatch_date) = 2026
    )
  GROUP BY po.client_id
),
despachados AS (
  SELECT po.client_id, SUM(par.quantity) AS kilos_despachados
  FROM partials par
  JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0
  JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled'
  WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND YEAR(par.dispatch_date) = 2026
  GROUP BY po.client_id
)
SELECT c.client_name, c.nit, p.kilos_pedidos, COALESCE(d.kilos_despachados,0) AS kilos_despachados,
  ROUND(COALESCE(d.kilos_despachados,0)/NULLIF(p.kilos_pedidos,0)*100,2) AS fill_rate_pct
FROM pedidos p
JOIN clients c ON c.id = p.client_id
LEFT JOIN despachados d ON d.client_id = p.client_id
WHERE p.kilos_pedidos > 1000
ORDER BY fill_rate_pct ASC;

question: ¿Cuál es el valor en COP de los despachos de mayo de 2026, usando la cascada de TRM normalizada?
sql: WITH despachos_con_trm AS (SELECT par.id, par.quantity, COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0) AS precio_unitario, COALESCE( CASE WHEN NULLIF(par.trm+0,0) BETWEEN 3200 AND 10000 THEN NULLIF(par.trm+0,0) WHEN NULLIF(par.trm+0,0) > 10000 THEN NULLIF(par.trm+0,0)/100 ELSE NULL END, CASE WHEN NULLIF(po.trm+0,0) BETWEEN 3200 AND 10000 THEN NULLIF(po.trm+0,0) WHEN NULLIF(po.trm+0,0) > 10000 THEN NULLIF(po.trm+0,0)/100 ELSE NULL END, (SELECT td.value FROM trm_daily td WHERE td.date <= par.dispatch_date AND td.value >= 3200 ORDER BY td.date DESC LIMIT 1), 4000 ) AS trm_normalizada FROM partials par JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0 JOIN products p ON p.id = pop.product_id JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled' WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2026-05-31') SELECT SUM(quantity * precio_unitario) AS valor_usd, SUM(quantity * precio_unitario * trm_normalizada) AS valor_cop FROM despachos_con_trm;

question: regalame un balance comparando las ventas de enero a abril del 2025 VS 2026
sql:
WITH ventas_mes AS (
  SELECT
    YEAR(par.dispatch_date) AS anio,
    MONTH(par.dispatch_date) AS mes_num,
    SUM(par.quantity) AS kilos,
    SUM(par.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0)) AS valor_usd
  FROM partials par
  JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0
  JOIN products p ON p.id = pop.product_id
  JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled'
  WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL
    AND YEAR(par.dispatch_date) IN (2025, 2026)
    AND MONTH(par.dispatch_date) BETWEEN 1 AND 4
  GROUP BY YEAR(par.dispatch_date), MONTH(par.dispatch_date)
)
SELECT
  CASE mes_num
    WHEN 1 THEN 'ENERO'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'FEBRERO'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'MARZO'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'ABRIL'
  END AS mes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2025 THEN kilos ELSE 0 END) AS kilos_2025,
  SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2026 THEN kilos ELSE 0 END) AS kilos_2026,
  SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2026 THEN kilos ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2025 THEN kilos ELSE 0 END) AS variacion_kilos,
  ROUND(
    (SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2026 THEN kilos ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2025 THEN kilos ELSE 0 END))
    / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2025 THEN kilos ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100, 2
  ) AS variacion_pct_kilos,
  SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2025 THEN valor_usd ELSE 0 END) AS valor_usd_2025,
  SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2026 THEN valor_usd ELSE 0 END) AS valor_usd_2026,
  SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2026 THEN valor_usd ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2025 THEN valor_usd ELSE 0 END) AS variacion_usd,
  ROUND(
    (SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2026 THEN valor_usd ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2025 THEN valor_usd ELSE 0 END))
    / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2025 THEN valor_usd ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100, 2
  ) AS variacion_pct_usd
FROM ventas_mes
GROUP BY mes_num
ORDER BY mes_num;

WITH ventas_2025 AS (

  JOIN products p ON p.id = pop.product_id

  WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL
    AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2025-01-01' AND '2025-05-31'
    AND c.executive = 'claudia.cueter@finearom.com'
  GROUP BY c.id, c.client_name, c.nit
),
ventas_2026 AS (
  SELECT c.id AS client_id, c.client_name, c.nit,
         SUM(par.quantity) AS kilos_2026,
         SUM(par.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0)) AS valor_usd_2026,
         COUNT(DISTINCT p.code) AS referencias_2026
  FROM partials par
  JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0
  JOIN products p ON p.id = pop.product_id
  JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled'
  JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id
  WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL
    AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND '2026-05-31'
    AND c.executive = 'claudia.cueter@finearom.com'
  GROUP BY c.id, c.client_name, c.nit
),
todos_clientes AS (
  SELECT client_id, client_name, nit FROM ventas_2025
  UNION
  SELECT client_id, client_name, nit FROM ventas_2026
)
SELECT tc.client_name AS cliente, tc.nit,
       COALESCE(v25.kilos_2025, 0) AS kilos_2025,
       COALESCE(v26.kilos_2026, 0) AS kilos_2026,
       COALESCE(v26.kilos_2026, 0) - COALESCE(v25.kilos_2025, 0) AS variacion_kilos,
       COALESCE(v25.valor_usd_2025, 0) AS valor_usd_2025,
       COALESCE(v26.valor_usd_2026, 0) AS valor_usd_2026,
       COALESCE(v26.valor_usd_2026, 0) - COALESCE(v25.valor_usd_2025, 0) AS variacion_valor_usd,
       COALESCE(v25.referencias_2025, 0) AS referencias_2025,
       COALESCE(v26.referencias_2026, 0) AS referencias_2026,
       COALESCE(v26.referencias_2026, 0) - COALESCE(v25.referencias_2025, 0) AS variacion_referencias
FROM todos_clientes tc
LEFT JOIN ventas_2025 v25 ON v25.client_id = tc.client_id
LEFT JOIN ventas_2026 v26 ON v26.client_id = tc.client_id
ORDER BY variacion_valor_usd ASC;

question: Muestrame los productos con venta en kilos, venta en pesos y si es o no new win de este anio deli cliente bouquet aromas y fragancias
sql:
SELECT codigo, referencia, SUM(kilos) AS kilos, ROUND(SUM(valor_usd),2) AS valor_usd, ROUND(SUM(valor_cop),2) AS valor_cop,
       CASE WHEN MAX(new_win) = 1 THEN 'SI' ELSE 'NO' END AS new_win
FROM (
  SELECT p.code AS codigo, p.product_name AS referencia, pop.new_win AS new_win,
    par.quantity AS kilos,
    par.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0) AS valor_usd,
    par.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0) * COALESCE(
      NULLIF(CASE WHEN (par.trm+0) BETWEEN 3200 AND 10000 THEN (par.trm+0) WHEN (par.trm+0) > 10000 THEN (par.trm+0)/100 ELSE NULL END, 0),
      NULLIF(CASE WHEN (po.trm+0) BETWEEN 3200 AND 10000 THEN (po.trm+0) WHEN (po.trm+0) > 10000 THEN (po.trm+0)/100 ELSE NULL END, 0),
      (SELECT td.value FROM trm_daily td WHERE td.date <= par.dispatch_date AND td.value >= 3200 ORDER BY td.date DESC LIMIT 1),
      4000
    ) AS valor_cop
  FROM partials par
  JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0
  JOIN products p ON p.id = pop.product_id
  JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled'
  JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id
  WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL
    AND YEAR(par.dispatch_date) = 2026
    AND c.client_name LIKE '%bouquet aromas y fragancias%'
) t
GROUP BY codigo, referencia

       COUNT(DISTINCT pop.id) AS lineas,
       SUM(pop.quantity) AS kilos_totales,
       ROUND(SUM(pop.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0)), 2) AS valor_usd
FROM purchase_orders po
JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id
LEFT JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.purchase_order_id = po.id AND pop.muestra = 0
LEFT JOIN products p ON p.id = pop.product_id
WHERE c.executive = 'claudia.cueter@finearom.com'
  AND po.status != 'cancelled'
GROUP BY po.id, po.order_consecutive, c.client_name, c.nit, po.order_creation_date, po.status, po.is_new_win, po.is_muestra
ORDER BY po.order_creation_date DESC;

question: muéstrame las órdenes parciales con su porcentaje de avance (kilos reales despachados sobre kilos pedidos)

question: cuál es el ticket promedio por factura despachada en 2026 (valor USD total dividido entre número de facturas)
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT par.invoice_number) AS facturas, ROUND(SUM(par.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0)),2) AS valor_usd_total, ROUND(SUM(par.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0)) / COUNT(DISTINCT par.invoice_number),2) AS ticket_promedio_usd FROM partials par JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id=par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra=0 JOIN products p ON p.id=pop.product_id JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id=par.order_id AND po.status<>'cancelled' WHERE par.type='real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND YEAR(par.dispatch_date)=2026

question: compara los kilos despachados del mes actual contra el mes anterior

question: cuál es la antigüedad de la cartera por tramos: al día, 1 a 30, 31 a 60, 61 a 90 y más de 90 días
sql: SELECT CASE WHEN car.dias >= 0 THEN 'Al dia' WHEN ABS(car.dias) BETWEEN 1 AND 30 THEN '1-30 dias' WHEN ABS(car.dias) BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN '31-60 dias' WHEN ABS(car.dias) BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN '61-90 dias' ELSE '+90 dias' END AS tramo, COUNT(*) AS facturas, SUM(CAST(car.saldo_contable AS DECIMAL(20,2))) AS saldo_cop FROM cartera car WHERE car.fecha_cartera = (SELECT fecha_cartera FROM cartera GROUP BY fecha_cartera HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT nit) >= 0.5 * (SELECT MAX(cnt) FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT nit) cnt FROM cartera GROUP BY fecha_cartera) z) ORDER BY fecha_cartera DESC LIMIT 1) GROUP BY tramo ORDER BY saldo_cop DESC

question: cómo va el cumplimiento del pronóstico por referencia acumulado en lo que va del año 2026 (enero a julio), incluyendo referencias que se vendieron sin estar presupuestadas
sql: WITH product_ranked AS (SELECT id, client_id, code, product_name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY client_id, code ORDER BY id) rn FROM products), pron AS (SELECT sf.nit, sf.codigo, SUM(sf.cantidad_forecast) kilos_pron FROM sales_forecasts sf WHERE sf.modelo='manual' AND sf.año='2026' AND sf.mes IN ('ENERO','FEBRERO','MARZO','ABRIL','MAYO','JUNIO','JULIO') GROUP BY sf.nit, sf.codigo), reales AS (SELECT c.nit, p.code COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AS codigo, SUM(par.quantity) kilos_real FROM partials par JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id=par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra=0 JOIN products p ON p.id=pop.product_id JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id=par.order_id AND po.status<>'cancelled' JOIN clients c ON c.id=po.client_id WHERE par.type='real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND '2026-07-31' GROUP BY c.nit, p.code), claves AS (SELECT nit, codigo FROM pron UNION SELECT nit, codigo FROM reales) SELECT c.client_name cliente, k.nit, k.codigo, COALESCE(pr.product_name, k.codigo) referencia, COALESCE(p.kilos_pron,0) kilos_pronosticados, COALESCE(r.kilos_real,0) kilos_reales, COALESCE(r.kilos_real,0)-COALESCE(p.kilos_pron,0) brecha_kilos, ROUND(COALESCE(r.kilos_real,0)/NULLIF(p.kilos_pron,0)*100,2) cumplimiento_pct FROM claves k JOIN clients c ON c.nit=k.nit LEFT JOIN pron p ON p.nit=k.nit AND p.codigo=k.codigo LEFT JOIN reales r ON r.nit=k.nit AND r.codigo=k.codigo LEFT JOIN product_ranked pr ON pr.client_id=c.id AND pr.code COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci=k.codigo AND pr.rn=1 ORDER BY brecha_kilos DESC

question: qué productos tienen pronóstico manual para julio 2026 pero todavía no se les ha despachado nada
sql: WITH reales AS (SELECT c.nit, p.code COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AS codigo, SUM(par.quantity) kilos_real FROM partials par JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id=par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra=0 JOIN products p ON p.id=pop.product_id JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id=par.order_id AND po.status<>'cancelled' JOIN clients c ON c.id=po.client_id WHERE par.type='real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-07-01' AND '2026-07-31' GROUP BY c.nit, p.code), product_ranked AS (SELECT id, client_id, code, product_name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY client_id, code ORDER BY id) rn FROM products) SELECT c.client_name cliente, sf.nit, sf.codigo, COALESCE(pr.product_name, sf.codigo) referencia, SUM(sf.cantidad_forecast) kilos_pronosticados FROM sales_forecasts sf JOIN clients c ON c.nit=sf.nit LEFT JOIN product_ranked pr ON pr.client_id=c.id AND pr.code COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci=sf.codigo AND pr.rn=1 LEFT JOIN reales r ON r.nit=sf.nit AND r.codigo=sf.codigo WHERE sf.modelo='manual' AND sf.año='2026' AND sf.mes='JULIO' GROUP BY c.client_name, sf.nit, sf.codigo, pr.product_name HAVING COALESCE(MAX(r.kilos_real),0)=0 ORDER BY kilos_pronosticados DESC

question: qué referencias se han vendido este año sin estar en el pronóstico manual, o sea venta no planeada, entre enero y julio de 2026
sql: WITH pron AS (SELECT nit, codigo FROM sales_forecasts WHERE modelo='manual' AND año='2026' AND mes IN ('ENERO','FEBRERO','MARZO','ABRIL','MAYO','JUNIO','JULIO') GROUP BY nit, codigo), reales AS (SELECT c.nit, p.code AS codigo, MAX(p.product_name) referencia, SUM(par.quantity) kilos_real FROM partials par JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id=par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra=0 JOIN products p ON p.id=pop.product_id JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id=par.order_id AND po.status<>'cancelled' JOIN clients c ON c.id=po.client_id WHERE par.type='real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND '2026-07-31' GROUP BY c.nit, p.code) SELECT c.client_name cliente, r.nit, r.codigo, r.referencia, r.kilos_real kilos_reales FROM reales r JOIN clients c ON c.nit=r.nit LEFT JOIN pron p ON p.nit=r.nit AND p.codigo COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci=r.codigo WHERE p.nit IS NULL ORDER BY r.kilos_real DESC

question: qué clientes tienen ventas reales en 2026 pero no tienen ningún pronóstico manual cargado
sql: WITH pron AS (SELECT nit FROM sales_forecasts WHERE modelo='manual' AND año='2026' GROUP BY nit), reales AS (SELECT c.nit, SUM(par.quantity) kilos_real, COUNT(DISTINCT po.id) ocs FROM partials par JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id=par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra=0 JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id=par.order_id AND po.status<>'cancelled' JOIN clients c ON c.id=po.client_id WHERE par.type='real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND '2026-07-31' GROUP BY c.nit) SELECT c.client_name cliente, r.nit, c.executive ejecutiva, r.ocs, r.kilos_real kilos_reales FROM reales r JOIN clients c ON c.nit=r.nit LEFT JOIN pron p ON p.nit=r.nit WHERE p.nit IS NULL ORDER BY r.kilos_real DESC

question: dame la brecha en kilos y en dólares por cliente para julio 2026, comparando lo pronosticado contra lo despachado
sql: WITH product_ranked AS (SELECT id, client_id, code, price, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY client_id, code ORDER BY id) rn FROM products), pron_k AS (SELECT c.id client_id, SUM(sf.cantidad_forecast) kilos_pron FROM sales_forecasts sf JOIN clients c ON c.nit=sf.nit WHERE sf.modelo='manual' AND sf.año='2026' AND sf.mes='JULIO' GROUP BY c.id), pron_usd AS (SELECT c.id client_id, SUM(sf.cantidad_forecast*COALESCE(NULLIF(pr.price,0),0)) usd_pron FROM sales_forecasts sf JOIN clients c ON c.nit=sf.nit JOIN product_ranked pr ON pr.client_id=c.id AND pr.code COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci=sf.codigo AND pr.rn=1 WHERE sf.modelo='manual' AND sf.año='2026' AND sf.mes='JULIO' GROUP BY c.id), reales AS (SELECT c.id client_id, SUM(par.quantity) kilos_real, SUM(par.quantity*COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0),p.price,0)) usd_real FROM partials par JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id=par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra=0 JOIN products p ON p.id=pop.product_id JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id=par.order_id AND po.status<>'cancelled' JOIN clients c ON c.id=po.client_id WHERE par.type='real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-07-01' AND '2026-07-31' GROUP BY c.id), claves AS (SELECT client_id FROM pron_k UNION SELECT client_id FROM reales) SELECT c.client_name cliente, c.nit, COALESCE(pk.kilos_pron,0) kilos_pron, COALESCE(r.kilos_real,0) kilos_real, COALESCE(r.kilos_real,0)-COALESCE(pk.kilos_pron,0) brecha_kilos, ROUND(COALESCE(pu.usd_pron,0),2) usd_pron, ROUND(COALESCE(r.usd_real,0),2) usd_real, ROUND(COALESCE(r.usd_real,0)-COALESCE(pu.usd_pron,0),2) brecha_usd FROM claves k JOIN clients c ON c.id=k.client_id LEFT JOIN pron_k pk ON pk.client_id=k.client_id LEFT JOIN pron_usd pu ON pu.client_id=k.client_id LEFT JOIN reales r ON r.client_id=k.client_id ORDER BY brecha_kilos ASC

question: rankea las ejecutivas por porcentaje de cumplimiento acumulado del año, enero a julio 2026, con la brecha en kilos
sql: WITH pron_cli AS (SELECT c.id client_id, c.executive exec_email, SUM(sf.cantidad_forecast) pron FROM sales_forecasts sf JOIN clients c ON c.nit=sf.nit WHERE sf.modelo='manual' AND sf.año='2026' AND sf.mes IN ('ENERO','FEBRERO','MARZO','ABRIL','MAYO','JUNIO','JULIO') GROUP BY c.id, c.executive), real_cli AS (SELECT c.id client_id, SUM(par.quantity) real_k FROM partials par JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id=par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra=0 JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id=par.order_id AND po.status<>'cancelled' JOIN clients c ON c.id=po.client_id WHERE par.type='real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND '2026-07-31' GROUP BY c.id) SELECT e.name ejecutiva, SUM(p.pron) kilos_pronosticados, SUM(COALESCE(r.real_k,0)) kilos_reales, SUM(COALESCE(r.real_k,0))-SUM(p.pron) brecha_kilos, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(r.real_k,0))/NULLIF(SUM(p.pron),0)*100,2) cumplimiento_pct FROM pron_cli p JOIN executives e ON e.email=p.exec_email COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AND e.is_active=1 LEFT JOIN real_cli r ON r.client_id=p.client_id GROUP BY e.id, e.name ORDER BY cumplimiento_pct DESC

question: compara el pronóstico manual contra el modelo xgboost por referencia para julio 2026
sql: WITH product_ranked AS (SELECT id, client_id, code, product_name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY client_id, code ORDER BY id) rn FROM products), manual AS (SELECT nit, codigo, SUM(cantidad_forecast) k_manual FROM sales_forecasts WHERE modelo='manual' AND año='2026' AND mes='JULIO' GROUP BY nit, codigo), xgb AS (SELECT nit, codigo, SUM(cantidad_forecast) k_xgb FROM sales_forecasts WHERE modelo='xgboost' AND año='2026' AND mes='JULIO' GROUP BY nit, codigo), claves AS (SELECT nit, codigo FROM manual UNION SELECT nit, codigo FROM xgb) SELECT c.client_name cliente, k.nit, k.codigo, COALESCE(pr.product_name,k.codigo) referencia, COALESCE(m.k_manual,0) manual_kilos, COALESCE(x.k_xgb,0) xgboost_kilos, COALESCE(m.k_manual,0)-COALESCE(x.k_xgb,0) diferencia FROM claves k JOIN clients c ON c.nit=k.nit LEFT JOIN manual m ON m.nit=k.nit AND m.codigo=k.codigo LEFT JOIN xgb x ON x.nit=k.nit AND x.codigo=k.codigo LEFT JOIN product_ranked pr ON pr.client_id=c.id AND pr.code COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci=k.codigo AND pr.rn=1 WHERE COALESCE(m.k_manual,0)+COALESCE(x.k_xgb,0)>0 ORDER BY ABS(COALESCE(m.k_manual,0)-COALESCE(x.k_xgb,0)) DESC LIMIT 40

question: cuánto pronosticamos para este mes y cuánto llevamos ejecutado, con la proyección de cierre en kilos
sql: SELECT (SELECT SUM(cantidad_forecast) FROM sales_forecasts WHERE modelo='manual' AND año='2026' AND mes='JULIO') AS kilos_pronosticados, SUM(par.quantity) AS kilos_ejecutados, DAY(CURDATE()) dias_transcurridos, DAY(LAST_DAY(CURDATE())) dias_del_mes, ROUND(SUM(par.quantity)/DAY(CURDATE())*DAY(LAST_DAY(CURDATE())),2) proyeccion_cierre_kilos, ROUND(SUM(par.quantity)/NULLIF((SELECT SUM(cantidad_forecast) FROM sales_forecasts WHERE modelo='manual' AND año='2026' AND mes='JULIO'),0)*100,2) cumplimiento_actual_pct FROM partials par JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id=par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra=0 JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id=par.order_id AND po.status<>'cancelled' WHERE par.type='real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-07-01' AND CURDATE()

question: cuál es el cumplimiento acumulado del año por cliente, enero a julio 2026
sql: WITH pron_cli AS (SELECT c.id client_id, c.client_name, c.nit, SUM(sf.cantidad_forecast) pron FROM sales_forecasts sf JOIN clients c ON c.nit=sf.nit WHERE sf.modelo='manual' AND sf.año='2026' AND sf.mes IN ('ENERO','FEBRERO','MARZO','ABRIL','MAYO','JUNIO','JULIO') GROUP BY c.id, c.client_name, c.nit), real_cli AS (SELECT c.id client_id, SUM(par.quantity) real_k FROM partials par JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id=par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra=0 JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id=par.order_id AND po.status<>'cancelled' JOIN clients c ON c.id=po.client_id WHERE par.type='real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND '2026-07-31' GROUP BY c.id) SELECT p.client_name cliente, p.nit, p.pron kilos_pronosticados, COALESCE(r.real_k,0) kilos_reales, COALESCE(r.real_k,0)-p.pron brecha_kilos, ROUND(COALESCE(r.real_k,0)/NULLIF(p.pron,0)*100,2) cumplimiento_pct FROM pron_cli p LEFT JOIN real_cli r ON r.client_id=p.client_id ORDER BY cumplimiento_pct ASC

question: cómo va cada referencia de Bouquet frente a su presupuesto en lo que va del 2026, incluyendo lo que se vendió sin presupuesto
sql: WITH product_ranked AS (SELECT id, client_id, code, product_name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY client_id, code ORDER BY id) rn FROM products), pron AS (SELECT sf.nit, sf.codigo, SUM(sf.cantidad_forecast) kilos_pron FROM sales_forecasts sf JOIN clients c ON c.nit=sf.nit WHERE sf.modelo='manual' AND sf.año='2026' AND sf.mes IN ('ENERO','FEBRERO','MARZO','ABRIL','MAYO','JUNIO','JULIO') AND c.client_name LIKE '%Bouquet%' GROUP BY sf.nit, sf.codigo), reales AS (SELECT c.nit, p.code COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AS codigo, SUM(par.quantity) kilos_real FROM partials par JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id=par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra=0 JOIN products p ON p.id=pop.product_id JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id=par.order_id AND po.status<>'cancelled' JOIN clients c ON c.id=po.client_id WHERE par.type='real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND '2026-07-31' AND c.client_name LIKE '%Bouquet%' GROUP BY c.nit, p.code), claves AS (SELECT nit, codigo FROM pron UNION SELECT nit, codigo FROM reales) SELECT k.codigo, COALESCE(pr.product_name, k.codigo) referencia, COALESCE(p.kilos_pron,0) kilos_pronosticados, COALESCE(r.kilos_real,0) kilos_reales, COALESCE(r.kilos_real,0)-COALESCE(p.kilos_pron,0) brecha_kilos, ROUND(COALESCE(r.kilos_real,0)/NULLIF(p.kilos_pron,0)*100,2) cumplimiento_pct FROM claves k LEFT JOIN pron p ON p.nit=k.nit AND p.codigo=k.codigo LEFT JOIN reales r ON r.nit=k.nit AND r.codigo=k.codigo LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.nit=k.nit LEFT JOIN product_ranked pr ON pr.client_id=c.id AND pr.code COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci=k.codigo AND pr.rn=1 ORDER BY brecha_kilos DESC

question: rankea las ejecutivas por brecha en dólares entre lo pronosticado y lo despachado en julio 2026
sql: WITH product_ranked AS (SELECT id, client_id, code, price, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY client_id, code ORDER BY id) rn FROM products), pron AS (SELECT c.id client_id, c.executive exec_email, SUM(sf.cantidad_forecast*COALESCE(NULLIF(pr.price,0),0)) usd_pron FROM sales_forecasts sf JOIN clients c ON c.nit=sf.nit JOIN product_ranked pr ON pr.client_id=c.id AND pr.code COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci=sf.codigo AND pr.rn=1 WHERE sf.modelo='manual' AND sf.año='2026' AND sf.mes='JULIO' GROUP BY c.id, c.executive), reales AS (SELECT c.id client_id, SUM(par.quantity*COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0),p.price,0)) usd_real FROM partials par JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id=par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra=0 JOIN products p ON p.id=pop.product_id JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id=par.order_id AND po.status<>'cancelled' JOIN clients c ON c.id=po.client_id WHERE par.type='real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-07-01' AND '2026-07-31' GROUP BY c.id) SELECT e.name ejecutiva, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(pn.usd_pron,0)),2) usd_pronosticado, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(rl.usd_real,0)),2) usd_real, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(rl.usd_real,0))-SUM(COALESCE(pn.usd_pron,0)),2) brecha_usd FROM pron pn JOIN executives e ON e.email=pn.exec_email COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AND e.is_active=1 LEFT JOIN reales rl ON rl.client_id=pn.client_id GROUP BY e.id, e.name ORDER BY brecha_usd ASC

question: compárame por mes el pronóstico manual, el del modelo xgboost y lo realmente despachado, de abril a julio 2026
sql: WITH manual AS (SELECT mes, SUM(cantidad_forecast) k FROM sales_forecasts WHERE modelo='manual' AND año='2026' AND mes IN ('ABRIL','MAYO','JUNIO','JULIO') GROUP BY mes), xgb AS (SELECT mes, SUM(cantidad_forecast) k FROM sales_forecasts WHERE modelo='xgboost' AND año='2026' AND mes IN ('ABRIL','MAYO','JUNIO','JULIO') GROUP BY mes), reales AS (SELECT ELT(MONTH(par.dispatch_date)-3,'ABRIL','MAYO','JUNIO','JULIO') mes, SUM(par.quantity) k FROM partials par JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id=par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra=0 JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id=par.order_id AND po.status<>'cancelled' WHERE par.type='real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-04-01' AND '2026-07-31' GROUP BY ELT(MONTH(par.dispatch_date)-3,'ABRIL','MAYO','JUNIO','JULIO')) SELECT m.mes, COALESCE(man.k,0) manual_kilos, COALESCE(x.k,0) xgboost_kilos, COALESCE(r.k,0) real_despachado FROM (SELECT 'ABRIL' mes UNION SELECT 'MAYO' UNION SELECT 'JUNIO' UNION SELECT 'JULIO') m LEFT JOIN manual man ON man.mes=m.mes LEFT JOIN xgb x ON x.mes=m.mes LEFT JOIN reales r ON r.mes COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci=m.mes ORDER BY FIELD(m.mes,'ABRIL','MAYO','JUNIO','JULIO')

question: qué referencias le faltan por vender a Maria Juliana Ortega en julio 2026 según el presupuesto
sql: WITH product_ranked AS (SELECT id, client_id, code, product_name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY client_id, code ORDER BY id) rn FROM products), reales AS (SELECT c.nit, p.code COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AS codigo, SUM(par.quantity) kilos_real FROM partials par JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id=par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra=0 JOIN products p ON p.id=pop.product_id JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id=par.order_id AND po.status<>'cancelled' JOIN clients c ON c.id=po.client_id WHERE par.type='real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-07-01' AND '2026-07-31' GROUP BY c.nit, p.code) SELECT c.client_name cliente, sf.codigo, COALESCE(pr.product_name, sf.codigo) referencia, SUM(sf.cantidad_forecast) kilos_pronosticados, COALESCE(MAX(r.kilos_real),0) kilos_reales, SUM(sf.cantidad_forecast)-COALESCE(MAX(r.kilos_real),0) faltan FROM sales_forecasts sf JOIN clients c ON c.nit=sf.nit LEFT JOIN product_ranked pr ON pr.client_id=c.id AND pr.code COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci=sf.codigo AND pr.rn=1 LEFT JOIN reales r ON r.nit=sf.nit AND r.codigo=sf.codigo WHERE sf.modelo='manual' AND sf.año='2026' AND sf.mes='JULIO' AND c.executive='maria.ortega@finearom.com' GROUP BY c.client_name, sf.codigo, pr.product_name HAVING SUM(sf.cantidad_forecast) > COALESCE(MAX(r.kilos_real),0) ORDER BY faltan DESC

question: qué referencias tuvieron más cambios de precio durante 2026, con su precio mínimo y máximo
sql: SELECT p.code, MAX(p.product_name) AS product_name, COUNT(DISTINCT pph.price) AS precios_distintos, MIN(pph.price) AS precio_min, MAX(pph.price) AS precio_max FROM product_price_history pph JOIN products p ON p.id = pph.product_id WHERE YEAR(pph.effective_date) = 2026 GROUP BY p.code HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT pph.price) > 1 ORDER BY precios_distintos DESC LIMIT 20

question: cuántas referencias distintas se le despacharon a cada cliente en 2026, con el total de kilos

question: qué productos siguen vigentes, es decir con al menos un despacho real en los últimos 90 días
sql: SELECT p.code, MAX(p.product_name) AS product_name, MAX(par.dispatch_date) AS ultimo_despacho, SUM(par.quantity) AS kilos_90d FROM partials par JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0 JOIN products p ON p.id = pop.product_id JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled' WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND par.dispatch_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) GROUP BY p.code ORDER BY kilos_90d DESC LIMIT 30

question: hazme un análisis de Pareto: qué referencias concentran hasta el 80% de los kilos despachados en 2026, con su porcentaje acumulado
sql: WITH por_producto AS (SELECT p.code, MAX(p.product_name) AS product_name, SUM(par.quantity) AS kilos FROM partials par JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0 JOIN products p ON p.id = pop.product_id JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled' WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND YEAR(par.dispatch_date) = 2026 GROUP BY p.code), acum AS (SELECT code, product_name, kilos, SUM(kilos) OVER (ORDER BY kilos DESC) AS kilos_acum, SUM(kilos) OVER () AS kilos_total FROM por_producto) SELECT code, product_name, kilos, ROUND(kilos_acum / kilos_total * 100, 2) AS pct_acumulado FROM acum WHERE kilos_acum / kilos_total <= 0.80 ORDER BY kilos DESC

question: cuál es la participación porcentual de cada referencia sobre el valor total en USD despachado en 2026

question: cuáles son las 15 referencias con mayor valor despachado en pesos (COP) en 2026, usando la cascada de TRM
sql: SELECT code, MAX(product_name) AS product_name, ROUND(SUM(valor_cop), 2) AS valor_cop FROM (SELECT p.code AS code, p.product_name AS product_name, par.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0) * COALESCE(NULLIF(CASE WHEN (par.trm + 0) BETWEEN 3200 AND 10000 THEN (par.trm + 0) WHEN (par.trm + 0) > 10000 THEN (par.trm + 0) / 100 ELSE NULL END, 0), NULLIF(CASE WHEN (po.trm + 0) BETWEEN 3200 AND 10000 THEN (po.trm + 0) WHEN (po.trm + 0) > 10000 THEN (po.trm + 0) / 100 ELSE NULL END, 0), (SELECT td.value FROM trm_daily td WHERE td.date <= par.dispatch_date AND td.value >= 3200 ORDER BY td.date DESC LIMIT 1), 4000) AS valor_cop FROM partials par JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0 JOIN products p ON p.id = pop.product_id JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled' WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND YEAR(par.dispatch_date) = 2026) t GROUP BY code ORDER BY valor_cop DESC LIMIT 15

question: compárame los kilos por referencia de 2026 vs 2025 y muéstrame las que más cayeron
sql: WITH v AS (SELECT p.code, MAX(p.product_name) AS product_name, YEAR(par.dispatch_date) AS anio, SUM(par.quantity) AS kilos FROM partials par JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0 JOIN products p ON p.id = pop.product_id JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled' WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND YEAR(par.dispatch_date) IN (2025, 2026) GROUP BY p.code, YEAR(par.dispatch_date)) SELECT code, MAX(product_name) AS product_name, SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2025 THEN kilos ELSE 0 END) AS kilos_2025, SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2026 THEN kilos ELSE 0 END) AS kilos_2026, SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2026 THEN kilos ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2025 THEN kilos ELSE 0 END) AS variacion FROM v GROUP BY code ORDER BY variacion ASC LIMIT 20

question: en qué ciudades están concentrados nuestros clientes activos
sql:
# ⚠ MariaDB rechaza GROUP BY con la expresión compleja repetida (error 1055, aunque sea idéntica al SELECT).
# Patrón: calcular la expresión en una subconsulta derivada y agrupar AFUERA por el alias.
SELECT ciudad, COUNT(*) AS clientes
FROM (
  SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(c.city,''), NULLIF(c.ciudad,''), '(sin ciudad)') AS ciudad
  FROM clients c
  WHERE c.status = 'active'
) t
GROUP BY ciudad
ORDER BY clientes DESC
LIMIT 15

question: cuál es el fill rate (kilos despachados sobre pedidos) por ejecutiva para las OCs creadas en 2026
sql:
# ⚠ Reporte POR EJECUTIVA: JOIN interno a executives con is_active=1.
# NO uses LEFT JOIN + COALESCE(e.name,'Sin ejecutiva'): clients.executive tiene basura
# ('executive', sabores@finearom.com) y eso crea una fila fantasma que la regla prohíbe.
WITH ped AS (SELECT c.executive AS ek, SUM(pop.quantity) AS pedido FROM purchase_orders po JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.purchase_order_id = po.id WHERE po.status <> 'cancelled' AND pop.muestra = 0 AND YEAR(po.order_creation_date) = 2026 GROUP BY c.executive), desp AS (SELECT c.executive AS ek, SUM(pt.quantity) AS despachado FROM partials pt JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = pt.order_id JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = pt.product_order_id WHERE pt.type = 'real' AND pt.deleted_at IS NULL AND pop.muestra = 0 AND po.status <> 'cancelled' AND YEAR(po.order_creation_date) = 2026 GROUP BY c.executive) SELECT e.name AS ejecutiva, ROUND(SUM(ped.pedido),1) AS kilos_pedidos, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(desp.despachado,0)),1) AS kilos_despachados, ROUND(100 * SUM(COALESCE(desp.despachado,0)) / NULLIF(SUM(ped.pedido),0),1) AS fill_rate_pct FROM ped LEFT JOIN desp ON desp.ek = ped.ek JOIN executives e ON e.email COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = ped.ek AND e.is_active = 1 GROUP BY e.name ORDER BY fill_rate_pct DESC

question: cuál es la participación porcentual de cada ejecutiva sobre el valor total despachado en USD en 2026

SELECT e.name AS ejecutiva, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0) * pt.quantity),2) AS valor_usd, ROUND(100 * SUM(COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0) * pt.quantity) / SUM(SUM(COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0) * pt.quantity)) OVER (),2) AS pct FROM partials pt JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = pt.order_id JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id JOIN executives e ON e.email COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = c.executive AND e.is_active = 1 JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = pt.product_order_id JOIN products p ON p.id = pop.product_id WHERE pt.type = 'real' AND pt.deleted_at IS NULL AND pop.muestra = 0 AND po.status <> 'cancelled' AND YEAR(pt.dispatch_date) = 2026 GROUP BY e.name ORDER BY valor_usd DESC

question: qué porcentaje de entregas a tiempo tiene cada ejecutiva en 2026, comparando el despacho real contra la fecha estimada
sql:
# ⚠ Reporte POR EJECUTIVA: JOIN interno a executives con is_active=1.
# NO uses LEFT JOIN + COALESCE(e.name,'Sin ejecutiva'): clients.executive tiene basura
# ('executive', sabores@finearom.com) y eso crea una fila fantasma que la regla prohíbe.
SELECT e.name AS ejecutiva, COUNT(*) AS despachos, SUM(CASE WHEN pt.dispatch_date <= est.fecha_est THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS a_tiempo, ROUND(100 * SUM(CASE WHEN pt.dispatch_date <= est.fecha_est THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*),1) AS pct_a_tiempo FROM partials pt JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = pt.order_id JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id JOIN executives e ON e.email COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = c.executive AND e.is_active = 1 JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = pt.product_order_id JOIN (SELECT product_order_id, MIN(dispatch_date) AS fecha_est FROM partials WHERE type = 'temporal' AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY product_order_id) est ON est.product_order_id = pt.product_order_id WHERE pt.type = 'real' AND pt.deleted_at IS NULL AND pop.muestra = 0 AND po.status <> 'cancelled' AND YEAR(pt.dispatch_date) = 2026 GROUP BY e.name ORDER BY pct_a_tiempo DESC

question: dame los 10 productos con mayor valor despachado en pesos colombianos (COP) en mayo de 2026
sql:
# ⚠ COP + GROUP BY: la cascada TRM va POR FILA en una subconsulta derivada — adentro NO va
# ningún agregado ni GROUP BY (si metes MAX()/SUM() adentro sin GROUP BY: error 1140).
# El SUM y el GROUP BY van AFUERA. Mismo patrón que la regla del TRM.
SELECT codigo, referencia, ROUND(SUM(kilos), 1) AS kilos, ROUND(SUM(valor_cop), 2) AS valor_total_cop
FROM (
  SELECT p.code AS codigo, p.product_name AS referencia, par.quantity AS kilos,
         par.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price, 0), p.price, 0) * COALESCE(
           NULLIF(CASE WHEN (par.trm + 0) BETWEEN 3200 AND 10000 THEN (par.trm + 0)
                       WHEN (par.trm + 0) > 10000 THEN (par.trm + 0) / 100
                       ELSE NULL END, 0),
           (SELECT td.value FROM trm_daily td WHERE td.date <= par.dispatch_date AND td.value >= 3200
             ORDER BY td.date DESC LIMIT 1),
           4000
         ) AS valor_cop
  FROM partials par
  JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0
  JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status <> 'cancelled'
  JOIN products p ON p.id = pop.product_id
  WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL
    AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2026-05-31'
) t
GROUP BY codigo, referencia
ORDER BY valor_total_cop DESC
LIMIT 10

question: dame el scorecard de cada ejecutiva en 2026: OCs creadas, kilos pedidos, kilos despachados, fill rate, valor USD despachado y cartera vencida
sql:
# ⚠ SCORECARD COMPLETO — tres trampas a la vez:
#  1) FILL RATE: numerador y denominador deben cubrir el MISMO universo de OCs. Si el
#     denominador son las OCs CREADAS en 2026, el numerador son los despachos DE ESAS OCs
#     (sin importar la fecha del despacho). Mezclar "despachos de 2026" con "OCs creadas en
#     2026" invierte el ranking: Pardo pasó de 1ª (96,5%) a 3ª (81,4%) por esa mezcla.
#  2) INFLACIÓN DE KILOS PEDIDOS: SUM(pop.quantity) NUNCA en el mismo CTE que itera partials
#     (una línea con N despachos contaría el pedido N veces). Por eso van CTEs separados.
#  3) CARTERA: último snapshot COMPLETO, saldo_contable con dias<0. Nunca SUM(saldo_vencido).
WITH ocs AS (
  SELECT c.executive AS ek, COUNT(DISTINCT po.id) AS ocs_creadas, SUM(pop.quantity) AS kilos_pedidos
  FROM purchase_orders po
  JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id
  JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.purchase_order_id = po.id AND pop.muestra = 0
  WHERE po.status <> 'cancelled' AND YEAR(po.order_creation_date) = 2026
  GROUP BY c.executive
),
desp AS (
  SELECT c.executive AS ek, SUM(pt.quantity) AS kilos_despachados,
         SUM(COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0) * pt.quantity) AS valor_usd
  FROM partials pt
  JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = pt.order_id AND po.status <> 'cancelled'
  JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id
  JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = pt.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0
  JOIN products p ON p.id = pop.product_id
  WHERE pt.type = 'real' AND pt.deleted_at IS NULL
    AND YEAR(po.order_creation_date) = 2026
  GROUP BY c.executive
),
mora AS (
  SELECT c.executive AS ek, SUM(CAST(ca.saldo_contable AS DECIMAL(15,2))) AS cartera_vencida
  FROM cartera ca
  JOIN clients c ON c.nit = ca.nit
  WHERE ca.dias < 0
    AND ca.fecha_cartera = (SELECT fecha_cartera FROM cartera GROUP BY fecha_cartera
        HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT nit) >= 0.5 * (SELECT MAX(cnt) FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT nit) cnt FROM cartera GROUP BY fecha_cartera) z)
        ORDER BY fecha_cartera DESC LIMIT 1)
  GROUP BY c.executive
)
SELECT e.name AS ejecutiva,
       o.ocs_creadas,
       ROUND(o.kilos_pedidos, 1) AS kilos_pedidos,
       ROUND(COALESCE(d.kilos_despachados, 0), 1) AS kilos_despachados,
       ROUND(100 * COALESCE(d.kilos_despachados, 0) / NULLIF(o.kilos_pedidos, 0), 1) AS fill_rate_pct,
       ROUND(COALESCE(d.valor_usd, 0), 2) AS valor_usd_despachado,
       ROUND(COALESCE(m.cartera_vencida, 0), 0) AS cartera_vencida_cop
FROM ocs o
JOIN executives e ON e.email COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = o.ek AND e.is_active = 1
LEFT JOIN desp d ON d.ek = o.ek
LEFT JOIN mora m ON m.ek = o.ek
ORDER BY fill_rate_pct DESC
